_notes: W4A fuse box (PLAN_W4A + audits/W4A_GO_RECORD.md). Four flag-gated items,
CHAD_DQ_POLICIES, each off|shadow|enforce (garbage -> off). This config
defines buckets and thresholds only — it grants no authority by itself;
mode flips are separate operator GOs per flag.
A missing/corrupt version of this file DISARMS the fuse box (no buckets,
no trips) — it can never invent a trip. Thresholds are negative USD
(session net PnL at-or-below trips) or consecutive trusted losing closes.
Counting substrate: trusted closed_trade.v1 rows only — see
chad/risk/fuse_box.py docstring for the full predicate chain, including
the INCIDENT-0723 provenance verification (drill/dry_run rows can never
move a counter). 'unknown' may never appear in a regimes scope (D2 rider:
unstamped rows count toward GLOBAL legs only; loader strips it, engine
families/setup_fuses land at W4A-2/3; symbol/sector buckets at W4A-4

families._note: W4A-2 (D1): named groups over the 18 registry strategy_ids (chad.types.StrategyName). Union must stay within DECLARED and cover ACTIVE — pinned hard by chad/tests/test_w4a_fuse_config_parity.py (W3B-9 perimeter idiom), warn-tier at the runtime bucket builder. Per-family threshold overrides may be added as {'family_thresholds': {name: {...}}} later; defaults apply until then.

setup_fuses._note: W4A-2 (D1): sub-strategy grain for the setup_family-stamped strategies (PLAN_W4A P13). Buckets form as setup:<strategy>:<setup_family> from stamps observed in the trusted ledger — no fixed setup list to drift.
